title: प्रभु तेरे हाथों में
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: I have graven thee upon the palms of my hands
My times are in thy hand

story: A deeply comforting Hindi bhajan that expresses complete surrender and trust in God's hands. Sung widely in North Indian churches during times of trial and uncertainty, this hymn reassures believers that their lives are safely held in the loving hands of the Lord.

lines: प्रभु तेरे हाथों में मेरा जीवन है
तेरी इच्छा में ही मेरा चैन है
जहाँ तू ले चले मैं वहाँ चलूँगा
प्रभु तेरे हाथों में मेरा जीवन है
linesRomanized: Prabhu tere haathon mein mera jeevan hai
Teri ichha mein hi mera chain hai
Jahaan tu le chale main vahaan chaloonga
Prabhu tere haathon mein mera jeevan hai

lines: तू मेरा चरवाहा मुझे कुछ कमी नहीं
तू मेरी ढाल है मुझे कुछ भय नहीं
अँधेरी घाटी में भी तू साथ है
प्रभु तेरे हाथों में मेरा जीवन है
linesRomanized: Tu mera charvaaha mujhe kuchh kami nahin
Tu meri dhaal hai mujhe kuchh bhay nahin
Andheri ghaati mein bhi tu saath hai
Prabhu tere haathon mein mera jeevan hai

lines: तेरी कृपा सदा मेरे संग रहे
प्रभु तेरे हाथों में मेरा जीवन है
linesRomanized: Teri krupaa sadaa mere sang rahe
Prabhu tere haathon mein mera jeevan hai
